When buy product shipped to work address:
  avoid: Agent looped repeatedly calling ask_user with the same message instead of acting in the app; even when info is needed, ask once then proceed to open the app, find the product, and use/add the work address rather than re-asking indefinitely.

When buy a product and confirm address:
  avoid: Agent looped endlessly re-typing the same search query and re-submitting/scrolling without ever opening a product, selecting options, or asking the user for the address; break the loop by committing to a result, proceeding to checkout, and asking the user when address input is required.

When favorite posts in a feed:

  avoid: Opening the overflow menu to check status wastes turns and risks triggering report/bookmark flows; favorite directly via the inline star icon instead of the options menu.

When create a list with members:
  do: open Lists submenu from the menu -> tap create new list -> tap name field -> type list name -> set 'Show replies to' option -> confirm/create -> tap add-members button -> tap each member to add
  avoid: Wasting all attempts hunting for Lists in the profile overflow menu, avatar long-press, or Explore tab and looping; instead open the Lists entry directly from the side/navigation menu.

When export following list to CSV:
  avoid: Agents wandered the in-app profile/menus and Files app blindly searching for an export option, even fabricating a rename flow. The Mastodon app has no native follows-export; the CSV must be produced at the required path (/storage/emulated/0/Download/my_following.csv) — don't aimlessly tap menus; identify the actual export entry point (web/account data export) before acting.

When compute late-payment amount from invoice:
  avoid: All attempts guessed/mis-applied the interest math (45 days as 1.5 months gave ~104420.1, while expected 104417.7 implies pro-rating by exact days: 102120×0.015×45/30.41 or similar daily rate). Read the exact figures and terms from the PDF and compute interest using the precise day-count the invoice specifies rather than rounding 45 days to 1.5 months.
